title: UAT-8837: AD Recon, Identity Pivot & Reverse Tunnel Defense

steps.title: Initial access via vulnerability exploitation
steps.text: UAT-8837 exploits zero-day vulnerabilities like CVE-2025-53690 (ViewState Deserialization in SiteCore) or uses compromised credentials to gain initial access to target environments.
steps.description: UAT-8837 exploits zero-day vulnerabilities like CVE-2025-53690 (ViewState Deserialization in SiteCore) or uses compromised credentials to gain initial access to target environments.

steps.title: System reconnaissance and discovery
steps.text: Conducts preliminary reconnaissance using commands like ping, tasklist, netstat, whoami, quser, and hostname to understand the compromised environment.
steps.description: Conducts preliminary reconnaissance using commands like ping, tasklist, netstat, whoami, quser, and hostname to understand the compromised environment.
steps.detectionHints: Monitor for T1082, T1033, T1049 indicators

steps.title: RDP configuration modification
steps.text: Disables RestrictedAdmin for Remote Desktop Protocol to facilitate credential harvesting and lateral movement by modifying registry settings.
steps.description: Disables RestrictedAdmin for Remote Desktop Protocol to facilitate credential harvesting and lateral movement by modifying registry settings.

steps.title: Tool deployment and staging
steps.text: Downloads and stages multiple tools including GoTokenTheft, Earthworm, DWAgent, and SharpHound to various directories for post-compromise activities.
steps.description: Downloads and stages multiple tools including GoTokenTheft, Earthworm, DWAgent, and SharpHound to various directories for post-compromise activities.

steps.title: Network tunneling establishment
steps.text: Deploys Earthworm network tunneling tool to create reverse tunnels to attacker-controlled infrastructure, enabling persistent access and command execution.
steps.description: Deploys Earthworm network tunneling tool to create reverse tunnels to attacker-controlled infrastructure, enabling persistent access and command execution.

steps.title: Active Directory reconnaissance
steps.text: Uses SharpHound, Certipy, and native Windows tools like dsquery/dsget to enumerate Active Directory structure, users, groups, and service principal names.
steps.description: Uses SharpHound, Certipy, and native Windows tools like dsquery/dsget to enumerate Active Directory structure, users, groups, and service principal names.
steps.detectionHints: Monitor for T1087.002, T1069.002, T1018 indicators

steps.title: Credential harvesting and privilege escalation
steps.text: Deploys GoTokenTheft, Rubeus, and Impacket tools to steal access tokens, abuse Kerberos, and execute commands with elevated privileges across the network.
steps.description: Deploys GoTokenTheft, Rubeus, and Impacket tools to steal access tokens, abuse Kerberos, and execute commands with elevated privileges across the network.
steps.detectionHints: Monitor for T1134, T1558, T1550 indicators

steps.title: Persistence through backdoor accounts
steps.text: Creates new user accounts and adds existing accounts to privileged groups to maintain persistent access to the compromised environment.
steps.description: Creates new user accounts and adds existing accounts to privileged groups to maintain persistent access to the compromised environment.
steps.detectionHints: Monitor for T1136.002, T1098, T1560, T1556, T1005 indicators
